REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT NG, STEPHEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-09-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-10-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MOHAMMAD MATINFAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STEPHEN NG IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2017 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,900.01 FILED BY MATINFAR, MOHAMMAD AS TO DEFENDANT NG, STEPHEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MATINFAR, MOHAMMAD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NG, STEPHEN $3,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,035.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT NG, STEPHEN
ORDER (SC-152) ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL:[X] THE REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL IS APPROVED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-13-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-09-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
